name: sd_node_ops
description: SD 节点创建、连接、参数设置指南。包含原子节点和库节点的使用方式。 Use when AI needs to: (1) create nodes, (2) connect nodes, (3) set parameters, (4) build material graphs. Substance Designer only (run_python).
author: ArtClaw
